summary: End-to-end regression validation after code-quality refactor (env-var creds, useMemo/useCallback AuthProvider, stable key props in ProductDetail and Brands, hero image swap). Updated stale pytest counts to new 17-product catalogue and ran full backend pytest suite (15/15 passing). Frontend smoke-tested across Home, Products, Product Detail, Brands, and Admin login flows — no console errors and no React duplicate-key warnings on the refactored routes.
critical_code_review_comments: Request mentioned admin login data-testids 'admin-email-input/admin-password-input/admin-login-btn' but actual AdminLogin.jsx uses 'login-email/login-password/login-submit'. Either align the request docs or rename the testids for consistency with the rest of the admin pages.

test_sm_paints.py pytest file had stale product-count assertions (20/8/5/7). Updated to new catalogue (17 total / 10 vespa / 7 galleria / 0 general) and added explicit assertions for the 5 removed legacy products and presence of newly added Vespa Black Japan and Galleria Aluminium Paint.
Backend exposes 0 'general' line products yet the Products page UI still offers a General line filter — confirm this is intentional (no-op filter currently returns an empty grid).
seed_data_creation: None. Pytest admin CRUD test creates+deletes a TEST_General_X product transactionally.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live catalogue is 17 products: 10 vespa + 7 galleria + 0 general. Featured count = 8. Colors = 116 across 4 collections. Admin login testids in AdminLogin.jsx are 'login-email', 'login-password', 'login-submit' (NOT the 'admin-*' aliases mentioned in some requests). Hero on Home has testid 'hero-cover-image'. Brands page uses CSS grid (not <table>); ROWS has 9 unique labels keyed by row.label. ProductDetail features map keys by feature text. Both pages verified zero duplicate-key console warnings.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions found. Pytest count drift was a stale-fixture issue and has been corrected.

verification_evidence.admin_login: Successful — landed on /admin Overview showing 17 products, 116 colors
